item.description:
Mac Motion Cues 0.2

  • Adds multi-display and multi-Space motion cue support.
  • Adds persisted dot and halo style settings.
  • Adds reactive AirPods motion state and clearer onboarding states.
  • Adds optional vehicle detection with CoreLocation.
  • Adds German localization and consolidates app strings.
  • Improves dot rendering performance and memory behavior.
